# AUGMANITAI

> A curated terminology framework for phenomena at the human–AI interface, formalized as an RDF knowledge graph (SKOS, SKOS-XL, OntoLex-Lemon, SHACL, JSON-LD, TBX). Informed by ISO 704 / ISO 1087 / ISO 30042 (ISO-inspired, not ISO-certified). Published on Zenodo under CC BY-NC-ND 4.0 (data) and Apache-2.0 (code). Author: Andreas Ehstand (ORCID 0009-0006-3773-7796).

## Ethical disclaimer (§1–§20)

AUGMANITAI is purely descriptive linguistic-terminological research.
- §1 Descriptive, not normative.
- §11 Non-peer-reviewed (longitudinal n=1 terminological priority deposit). See METHODOLOGY.md §2.0.
- §13 No efficacy claims; not a substitute for professional advice.
- §7 18+ only.
- §16 ISO-inspired, not ISO-certified.
- §20 Must not be used as diagnostic label, medical/psychological classification, legal categorization, HR screening, credit scoring, insurance assessment, state surveillance, or profiling mechanism.

Full disclaimer: DISCLAIMER.md in the repository root.

## What AUGMANITAI is

A research terminology and a priority-establishing terminological deposit for phenomena that arise at the interface between humans and large language models. Each term has a definition, genus/differentia structure, characteristics, and relations, serialized as a W3C-native knowledge graph plus a TBX export. The priority claim covers the schema as a whole — selection, definition, relation structure, and serialization — not the invention of each individual term. It is a research instrument, not a product, not a methodology, not a manifesto.

## Repository structure

- ontology/ — core OWL, SKOS, OntoLex-Lemon, SKOS-XL, JSON-LD, SHACL, TBX
- protocols/ — MCP, A2A, ANP, AG-UI protocol adapters
- provenance/ — C2PA, SPDX 3.0 AI Profile, CycloneDX 1.6 ML-BOM, W3C VC 2.0
- graphrag-variants/ — six GraphRAG integration examples (offline mock LLMs)
- demo-swarms/ — multi-agent reference examples (mock LLMs)
- governance/ — Code of Conduct, CLA, DCO, Security, Maintainers, Roadmap
- licensing/ — dual-license files, SPDX, PATENT, TRADEMARK, NOTICE

## Licensing

- Data (terms, definitions, relations, serializations): CC BY-NC-ND 4.0
- Code (generators, validators, tooling, demos): Apache 2.0
- SPDX: CC-BY-NC-ND-4.0 AND Apache-2.0
- Commercial licensing of the data layer: contact the author via ORCID.

## AI transparency (EU AI Act Article 50)

This repository contains AI-related and partly AI-generated / synthetic illustrative content, marked as synthetic where it appears. Descriptive research only; not a diagnostic or normative instrument.
